description: arXiv:2607.08783v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Manifold-valued measurements are prevalent in various machine learning tasks. Recent advances have extended Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to operate on manifolds. These extensions have been accompanied by normalization techniques tailored to different geometries, collectively referred to as Riemannian normalization. However, most existing...
author: Ziheng Chen, Yue Song, Rui Wang, Xiao-Jun Wu, Nicu Sebe
